user_context: i stuck in a same role beacuse i think i dint have skill and the doubt inside me dont know what to do
hook: Some days I cry in the office bathroom stall
slide2: I keep applying for jobs but bomb the first question. Every. Single. Time. Like my brain just snoozes when it counts.
slide3: They think I'm confident because I laugh at their jokes. But my hands shake when I talk to seniors.
slide4: Maybe I'm not built for this. Maybe I'm just pretending hard enough to trick myself too.
closer: Name one skill you’re secretly scared to test
caption:
I act like I got this. But inside I’m still 16 with zero life skills. What’s the thing you fake being good at?

#SamePageDifferentBook #FakeItTillYouMakeIt #WhyAreWeLikeThis #ImposterSyndrome
